title: The chokepoint economy: how a faltering Gulf peace ripples through the world
standfirst: As talks with Iran stall and the Strait of Hormuz sits at the centre of a mounting stand-off, the world is learning again how much can hinge on a narrow stretch of water. From airline fuel stocks to household energy bills, the costs of a geopolitical misstep are already being felt — and could yet reshape politics and industry far from the Gulf.
